channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Spearfisher Killed in Australia's Second Fatal Shark Attack in a Week
item.description: A spearfisher was fatally attacked on the Great Barrier Reef, marking Australia's second deadly shark incident in eight days.

item.title: Iran Agrees in Principle to Dispose of Highly Enriched Uranium, Official Says
item.description: A senior Trump official said negotiations are in a very good place, but a deal to end the Iran war likely won't be signed this weekend.

item.title: Full Transcript of 'Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan,' May 24, 2026
item.description: This broadcast features Kevin Hassett, White House National Economic Council director, and Sen. Chris Van Hollen, D...

item.title: Iran Agrees in Principle to Dispose of Highly Enriched Uranium, White House Official Says
item.description: Iran has agreed in principle to dispose of its highly enriched uranium, a senior Trump administration official said Sunday. CBS News' James...
